topicA: AI Visibility and Generative Engine Optimization for B2B
topicB: B2B Demand Generation and Pipeline Growth

recap.intro: This week you explored two exciting areas of B2B marketing: how AI is changing visibility and how to effectively grow your sales pipeline.
bullets: ChatGPT secretly 'Googles' things, meaning your business needs to rank high in these hidden searches to be mentioned by AI.
Brands recommended by AI saw 2.5 times more website visits, showing the power of being visible where AI looks.
Account-Based Marketing (ABM) is now a core strategy for B2B companies to grow, often combined with demand generation.
Improving the accuracy of contact information and being persistent with multiple messages can dramatically increase your sales leads.
recap.closing: This week you learned that adapting to new AI-driven visibility and refining your demand generation strategies are essential for B2B success.
